name: read_file
description: Read a file from the workspace. Returns the file's contents as a UTF-8 string (with replacement on invalid bytes), plus the byte length. Subject to the §11 sandbox: paths outside the workspace are refused.

path.description: Workspace-relative or absolute path. Absolute paths must be inside the §11 sandbox.

offset.description: Optional byte offset to start reading from. Default 0.

length.description: Optional max bytes to read. If omitted, the full file is returned subject to a harness-level cap.

content.description: UTF-8 decoded contents. Invalid bytes are replaced; the harness logs a tracing event when replacement occurred.

truncated.description: True iff the harness cap or caller's `length` truncated the read.
